charge_after_advance.name: Bounding Leap
charge_after_advance.description: Allows a unit to charge in the same turn it advanced.

charge_after_flee.description: Allows a unit to charge in a turn in which it fell back.

charge_impact.description: After this unit has charged, select one enemy unit withing engagement. Roll 1d6 : On a 4+, the target suffers 1 mortal wound

closest_target_penetration.description: When this unit makes a shooting attack at the closest eligible unit, add 1 to the weapon's penetration.

reactive_move.name: Skulking Horrors
reactive_move.description: Once per turn, after an enemy unit ends a move (normal, advance or retreat) within 9" of this unit, it can perform a normal move up to D6".

reroll_1_save_fight.description: During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the save rolls.

reroll_1_tohit_fight.description: During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the hit rolls.

reroll_1_towound.description: When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the wound rolls.

reroll_charge.description: When this unit makes a charge, it can reroll the charge roll.

reroll_towound_target_on_objective.description: When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll the wound rolls if the target unit is on an objective.

shoot_after_advance.description: Allows a unit to shoot in a turn in which it advanced.

shoot_after_flee.description: Allows a unit to shoot in a turn in which it fell back.

move_after_shooting.description: This unit can make a normal move up to 6" after shooting if it is not adjacent to an enemy unit. If it does so, this unit will not be able to charge until the end of the turn

adaptable_predators.description: Tyranid Warrior (range) : This unit can shoot and charge in a turn in which it fell back.

adaptable_predators_shoot_after_flee.name: Shoot After Flee (Adaptable Predators)
adaptable_predators_shoot_after_flee.description: Display rule for Adaptable Predators: allows shooting after fleeing.

adaptable_predators_charge_after_flee.name: Charge After Flee (Adaptable Predators)
adaptable_predators_charge_after_flee.description: Display rule for Adaptable Predators: allows charging after fleeing.

adrenalised_onslaught.description:
Tyranid Warrior (melee) : At the beginning of the fight phase, you can select one of the following ability to apply to this unit until the end of the phase :
 Aggression Imperative : During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the hit rolls.
 Preservation Imperative : During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the save rolls.

aggression_imperative.name: Aggression Imperative
aggression_imperative.description: During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the hit rolls.

preservation_imperative.name: Preservation Imperative
preservation_imperative.description: During the fight phase, when this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the save rolls.

cunning_hunters.description: Grey Hunters : This unit can shoot in a turn in which it fell back or advanced.

cunning_hunters_shoot_after_advance.name: Shoot After Advance (Cunning Hunters)
cunning_hunters_shoot_after_advance.description: Display rule for Cunning Hunters: allows shooting after advance.

cunning_hunters_shoot_after_flee.name: Shoot After Flee (Cunning Hunters)
cunning_hunters_shoot_after_flee.description: Display rule for Cunning Hunters: allows shooting after fleeing.

targeted_intercession.description: Assault Interecessor : When this unit makes an attack, it can reroll rolls of 1 for the wound rolls. If the target is on an objective, it can reroll the wound rolls.

targeted_intercession_reroll_1_towound.name: Reroll 1 To Wound (Targeted Intercession)
targeted_intercession_reroll_1_towound.description: Display rule for Targeted Intercession: reroll 1 on wound rolls.

targeted_intercession_reroll_towound_tar.name: Reroll To Wound on Objective (Targeted Intercession)
targeted_intercession_reroll_towound_tar.description: Display rule for Targeted Intercession: reroll wound rolls against targets on objective.
